name: Milk Chocolate Florentine Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Package NESTLE Toll House milk chocolate morsels (11.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Remove from heat and stir in oats, sugar, flour, corn syrup, milk, vanilla extract, and salt until well combined.
3. Drop the batter by measuring teaspoonfuls onto foil-lined cookie sheets, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
4. Spread each cookie thin with a rubber spatula.
5. Bake for 5-7 minutes. Cool on the cookie sheets before peeling away the foil.
6. Melt NESTLE Toll House milk chocolate morsels over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until smooth.
7. Place half of the cooled cookies in a bowl and top with melted chocolate. Add the remaining cookies on top to create sandwich cookies.
8. Makes 3 1/2 dozen sandwich cookies.
